zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Rake於1540年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親Nicholas Rake30歲，母親Catherine Katheryne Cockman30歲。她於1564年與William Haskell在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Rake于1540年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲Nicholas Rake30岁，母亲Catherine Katheryne Cockman30岁。她于1564年与William Haskell在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Rake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English rake ‘pass, steep track, narrow path up a hill’ (perhaps a transferred use of Old English hraca ‘throat’), for someone who lived at or near such a feature, or a habitational name from any of the minor places deriving their name from this word, such as The Rake (Sussex), Raikes Farm (Surrey), and Raikes (Yorkshire).

English: in northern England perhaps sometimes a habitational name from a minor place called with Middle English rake (Old Scandinvian rák) ‘cattle track, pasture ground’, a sense recorded in northwestern England.
Dutch: from Middle Dutch rake ‘rake’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such implements or as a nickname for a tall thin man.

variants.name: Rakes
meanings: English (Somerset) a variant of Rake with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Rake was born in 1540, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas Rake, was 30 and her mother, Catherine Katheryne Cockman, was 30. She married William Haskell in 1564, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She was buried in St Peter, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Rakeが1540年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Nicholas Rakeは30歳，母Catherine Katheryne Cockmanは30歳であった。1564年にイギリスソメルセトでWilliam Haskellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Rake(이)가 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Rake(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Katheryne Cockman(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1564년 영국 서머세트에서 William Haskell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Rake родилась в 1540 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas Rake было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Katheryne Cockman, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Haskell в 1564 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она была похоронена в местности ст питир, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
